title: Disconnect Timer
description: Adds a configurable timer to the disconnect button. inspired by MCSR Ranked
body:
# Disconnect Timer
Adds a configurable timer to the disconnect button works in both multi- and singleplayer.This mod aims to prevent you from easily ragequitting :3
!["shows the 'Escape' screen with the mod enabled"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ThatCuteOne/disconnect-timer-mod/refs/heads/master/docs/example.png)

With YACL based config screen!
!["Shows the YACL config screen"](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ThatCuteOne/disconnect-timer-mod/refs/heads/master/docs/config.png)
Contributions are welcome on github <3
